title: Train Technology
description: Late-game transport upgrade introducing trains. Trains provide massive capacity and speed improvements but require significant infrastructure investment (rails, stations). This transforms the trade landscape in late game.
definition-of-done: Train technology unlockable in late game. Rail infrastructure buildable. Trains provide major speed/capacity boost. Train routes operate differently from caravan routes.
testing-plan: Verify train unlock conditions. Test rail construction. Verify train speed/capacity benefits. Test train route operations.
